message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Mojaloop Adapter" as MojoAdapter
participant "API" as API
participant "api / Handler" as Handler
participant "Application Layer (domain / service / facade)" as AppLayer
participant "TigerBeetle Client" as Client
participant "TigerBeetle Cluster" as Cluster
participant "MySQL" as DB

note over MojoAdapter, API
Hub operator or DFSP interactions
end note

note over API
NodeJS interface invokes REST API
end note

note over Handler
JSON request decoded & processed via handler
end note

note over AppLayer
Expose service functions & handle database interactions
end note

subgraph Central-Settlement
    MojoAdapter
    API
    Handler
    AppLayer
end subgraph

subgraph Storage
    Client
    Cluster
    DB
end subgraph

subgraph UpdateSettlement
    1 JSON (settlement data)
    2 Invoke handler
    3 Invoke application layer
    4 Retrieve settlement data (excluding accounts)
    5 Retrieve accounts for all Transfers for a settlement window
    6 Update settlement data (excluding accounts)
    7 Settlement state processing
    8 Invoke account creation based on settlement state of each Transfer
    9 Create settlement accounts & return result
    10 Return settlement result
    11 Update final settlement state & return result
    12 Return result
    13 Return result
    14 Return result with settlementData
end subgraph

MojoAdapter -> API: 1 JSON (settlement data)
API -> Handler: 2 Invoke handler
Handler -> AppLayer: 3 Invoke application layer
AppLayer -> DB: 4 Retrieve settlement data (excluding accounts)
DB -> Client: 5 Retrieve accounts for all Transfers for a settlement window
Client -> AppLayer: 6 Update settlement data (excluding accounts)
AppLayer -> DB: 7 Settlement state processing
AppLayer -> DB: 8 Invoke account creation based on settlement state of each Transfer
DB -> Cluster: 9 Create settlement accounts & return result
Cluster -> AppLayer: 10 Return settlement result
AppLayer -> Handler: 11 Update final settlement state & return result
Handler -> API: 12 Return result
API -> MojoAdapter: 13 Return result
MojoAdapter -> API: 14 Return result with settlementData

@enduml
